meaning: vt.保证,担保,使安全,保证得到v.确保,确保,保证
examples: We tried to ensure that everyone got a fair deal.
Ensure there is a free flow of air around the machine.
Our role is to ensure liaison between schools and parents.
The Convention helps to ensure the effectiveness of the World Anti-Doping Code (the Code).
The ship is still undergoing renovations to ensure it offers an authentic 1930s experience.
